summary: Plan-mode live PR inventory classification for five open maintainer-owned draft PRs. No GitHub mutations are planned; merge, fix, and raise_pr are blocked by job frontmatter. The hydrated security-sensitive linked PR is routed separately without affecting the non-security PR inventory decisions.

actions.reason: Useful draft work in the session/transcript migration family, but not a duplicate/low-signal closeout candidate and not mergeable under this job.
Focused non-security hardening PR with maintainer-review status. It should remain open and independently reviewable rather than be closed in this inventory shard.
Related to the model-id policy hardening area and to hydrated #89646, but the artifact does not establish a boring duplicate/supersession closeout; it is draft and waiting on author.
Related to hydrated #89794 in the gateway UI descriptor area, but active review feedback and waiting-on-author status make closure unsafe.
Distinct gateway method-list hardening surface. It should remain open for author/maintainer follow-up rather than be closed as part of this inventory shard.
Exact hydrated security-sensitive linked ref is read-only and routed to central OpenClaw security handling; no closure or merge action is emitted.
